plans.title: Main House — Floor Plans
plans.description: Ground, First & Second floor layouts. 6,861 sq ft + 483 sq ft garage. Includes entrance hall, drawing room, study, bar, kitchen/family room, 5 bedrooms, lift.

plans.title: Outbuildings — Floor Plans
plans.description: Cottage (756 sq ft): 2 bedrooms, kitchen, sitting room. Pool House (586 sq ft): bar area. Outbuildings (1,516 sq ft): 7 stables, tack room, 4 stores.

plans.title: Estate Site Plan
plans.description: 11.15 acre estate boundary based on Ordnance Survey. Shows main house, The Bungalow, stables, tennis court, woodland and disused pit.
